_comment: Move-to-rear demo: zoom on the lone Spearmen (seed 12345, ~500,300, facing south toward the enemy), select it, then right-click a destination directly behind it (north). Because the destination is to the rear (>135 off facing), the regiment about-faces in place -- every soldier reverses 180 where they stand, front rank becoming rear rank man-for-man, the block keeping its footprint -- and then marches north facing its destination, instead of pivoting the whole block about its centre or sliding backwards. Watch the men turn about on the spot before the block steps off. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
